para_trans: Confidentiality of government officials
Writing a report.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance,
GOVERNMENT ORDER: S.A. 2026 / S.A. 109 / Aastha-2,
Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Road
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032.
Date: 24th June, 2026.
Read - 1) Government Decisions General Administration Department, No. CFR-1210 / Q. 47/2010 Thirteen,
Government Decisions Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance, No.S.A-2012 / Q.No.434 / Aastha-2
3) Circular No. S.A. / Aastha / Actions of Commissioner Social Welfare, Pune. Report / S.A. / 2026 /
the order
In respect of writing and preservation of confidential reports of Government officers / employees, Government Decision No.
General Administration Department Revised Procedure under CFR-1290 / Q. No. 47/2010 Thirteen, dated 01.11.2011
has been determined. Read No. 2 of the Commissioner of Social Welfare, Pune by order of the Government of
Reporting Officer on Confidential Reports of Group-A and Group-B Cadre Officers on Establishments, Review
Officers and version officers have been announced.
However, with the separate creation of the Other Backward Classes Bahujan Welfare Department and the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, the district
At the council level, a separate office was created for schemes for the differently abled.

Accordingly, the Commissioner Social Welfare Pune is required to re-declare the Reporting Officer, Review Officer and Editing Officer with respect to the Confidential Report of the Officers on Establishment. Consider all of these things.
Under this department, the Commissioner of Social Welfare, Pune, is responsible for the establishment of Group-A and Group-B cadre officers.
In respect of confidential reports, the Returning Officer, Reviewing Officer and Editing Officer are being declared as follows.

para_trans: 3. Confidentiality of Group-C and Group-D cadre employees of the Commissioner of Social Welfare, Pune under his charge.
Proceedings for declaration of Report Officer, Review Officer and Editing Officer in respect of the Report.
The Government may also take decisions under the General Administration Department No. CFR-1210 / Pt. No. 47/2010 Your
The procedure set by the date 01/11/2011 should be followed.
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
